description: So do tri thuc (Knowledge Graph) trich xuat tu chuong trinh Tieng Anh Academy Stars 3 & 4 cua truong. Moi node = 1 lesson trong syllabus (skill_id dung format as{grade}.{unit_slug}.l{lesson_order}). Dung de gan nhan skill_id cho cau hoi trong placement-test.schema.json va lam input cho BKT.
edge_note: Canh (edges) hien la chuoi tuyen tinh theo dung thu tu day trong syllabus (lesson truoc la tien quyet cua lesson sau, noi tiep tu AS3 sang AS4). Day la GIA DINH MAC DINH don gian hoa cho MVP, chua phan anh quan he tien quyet thuc (vd 1 diem ngu phap co the phu thuoc tu vung o unit khac, khong chi lesson lien ke). Can giao vien/chuyen gia mon hoc ra soat truoc khi dung cho chan doan chinh thuc.
generated_at_note: Sinh tu dong bang script parse file xlsx, chua qua kiem duyet giao vien (xem muc 5.2 PROJECT_DESCRIPTION.md - can duyet truoc khi dua vao bai lam thuc te).
